scope: single-seed bounded qualification of a count-projected self-correcting categorical element path

mechanism.categorical_path: uniform D3PM transition represented as diagonal plus rank-one uniform mass
mechanism.reverse_complexity: O(nodes * 118) per step; no dense 118x118 node transition tensor
mechanism.self_correction: every intermediate chemical token may change under the reverse posterior
mechanism.composition_prediction: mean of site clean-element posteriors with equal-weight graph composition cross entropy
mechanism.terminal_decoder: largest-remainder integer count prediction followed by exact count-constrained Hungarian site assignment
forbidden: target formula or composition counts as input

decision_rule.pass: qualify the corrected element path p(A|F_0,L_0,N) and permit only a separately frozen L1 lattice-head qualification
decision_rule.fail: stop before L1; do not rescue with more exposure or sampler search, and decide whether high-noise composition prediction or site assignment remains limiting
decision_rule.boundary: E1.1 cannot change historical H1a, qualify free joint generation, or authorize M1/J2, H1b-H6, tensor/oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
